Resume

Data Scientist and ML Researcher with 3+ years building predictive models, NLP pipelines, and analytics systems.

Download PDF

Experience

Senior Business Analyst

CertifyOS

Apr 2024 – Present
  • Designed credentialing volume forecasting models and KPI frameworks on millions of provider records in BigQuery and Looker, reducing onboarding delays by ~30% and improving SLA compliance from 95% to 99%.
  • Eliminated 60% of manual reporting overhead across 5+ product lines by engineering automated ETL pipelines and Looker dashboards, freeing ~40-60 analyst hours per week.
  • Built real-time operational monitoring tools and delay-prediction models using Python and SQL on millions of records.
  • Translated product adoption metrics and SLA data into executive-facing dashboards, informing 3+ product roadmap decisions per quarter.

Analyst

CertifyOS

Feb 2023 – Mar 2024
  • Improved NPI attribution accuracy by 10% across millions of provider records by building an NLP pipeline using spaCy and Hugging Face.
  • Boosted data accuracy by 50% across healthcare provider datasets by engineering automated cleaning, deduplication, and extraction pipelines.
  • Expanded platform provider coverage by 50% for Nurse and Mental Health categories by deploying automated ingestion pipelines for third-party datasets.
  • Built scalable data products and provider category models on millions of records, improving processing efficiency by 50%.

Analyst

Deloitte USI

Jun 2022 – Jan 2023
  • Improved database query performance by 5% for a healthcare client by optimizing SQL schema design and completing 6 new backend features in .NET C#.

Research Assistant

National Tsing Hua University, Taiwan

Jun 2021 – Apr 2022
  • Contributed to astrophysical turbulence research on AGN simulation datasets by analyzing velocity structure functions using Python's YT Project, supervised by Dr. Hsiang-Yi Karen Yang.

Research Intern

University of Hawaii

Jun 2021 – Dec 2021
  • Reduced n-body cosmological simulation runtime by 50+ hours per dataset by developing a deep neural network in PyTorch, with a reverse displacement field algorithm optimizing resource usage by 40%.

Education

B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

Indian Institute of Information Technology, Nagpur

May 2022

Final Year Project: Baryon density, Dark Matter density extraction, and Isotropy analysis of CMB using deep learning.
